_note: Drug-repurposing candidate set for the NR4A3 cryptic Pocket-5 selectivity screen. SMILES from the Broad Drug Repurposing Hub (Corsello et al., Nat Med 2017; non-commercial research use), desalted + drug-like filtered + deduped. Docking scores are HYPOTHESES, not affinities.
